sections.markdown:
- Activity: Sun Fun Run
- Started: 2025-06-22 08:10
- Distance: 19.4 km
- Moving time: 1:54:04
- Elapsed time: 1:54:11
- Elevation gain: 114.2 m
- Average heart rate: 162.7 bpm
- Max heart rate: 174 bpm
- Average watts: 195.5 W
- Average speed: 10.2 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `8` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `164.3 bpm`, ranging from `151.2` to `172.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `159.7 bpm` and second-half average HR was `168.8 bpm` (+9.1 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `173.9 spm`, with a working range of `171.9` to `175.1 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `173.7 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `174.0 spm` (+0.2 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:52 /km` across `19.427 km` in `1:54:04` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:54 /km` and second-half pace was `5:51 /km` (-3 s/km), so pace stayed broadly even.

- Strava summary HR came in at `162.7 bpm` average and `174 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `158.6 bpm` in the first half and `166.9 bpm` in the second (+8.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:54:04` out of `1:54:11` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `3` stop segments and `0.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `140.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.0 m` and `15.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `71.0 m` in the first half and `69.4 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
